title: ricinocarpus tenuis
intro: Ricinocarpus tenuis is a plant species in the family Annonaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus tenuis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Ricinocarpus tenuis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
